text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the final URA showdown, Trainer Kiryuin
admits that she has looked up to me as her ideal
and as her rival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though her frustration is evident, Happy Meek
takes her loss in stride in an effort to further
improve herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They both press on, promising to strive for an
even brighter tomorrow.
